prompt: Read swift/Sources/suit/FleetDashboard.swift and swift/Sources/suit/SettingsWindowController+Sections.swift in full, then summarize in five bullets what the fleet dashboard shows and how the settings sections are built. Cite the key function names.
Search the entire repository for every reference to NotificationCenter and report the three files with the most hits, describing which notifications each posts or observes.

Trace the life of a tab: read TabStore.swift, TabStripView.swift, Pane.swift, and any other file you need (re-reading files whenever you need to double-check), then explain how a newly created tab ends up displayed and focused in a pane. Cite the functions involved.
List every Swift source file under swift/Sources/suit and group them into functional areas, one line per area naming its files.
Using git log (read as much history as you need), summarize the major themes of the last 150 commits in this repository in six bullets.
